scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('frontend/dist', 'dist', { recursive: true });"
